prediction:
FROM customers c
| WHERE c.city = 'Beijing'
| SELECT c.customer_name, c.level
| ORDER c.customer_name ASC
repair_actions: Added ORDER c.customer_name ASC to enforce deterministic alphabetical ordering by customer_name.
raw_output:
{"id":"q002","prediction":"FROM customers c
| WHERE c.city = 'Beijing'
| SELECT c.customer_name, c.level
| ORDER c.customer_name ASC","repair_actions":["Added ORDER c.customer_name ASC to enforce deterministic alphabetical ordering by customer_name."],"confidence":"high"}

prediction:
FROM products p
| WHERE p.price > 1000
| SELECT p.product_name, p.category, p.price
| ORDER p.price DESC, p.product_name ASC
repair_actions: Added ORDER step to sort by p.price DESC and use p.product_name ASC as a deterministic tiebreaker.
raw_output:
{"id":"q003","prediction":"FROM products p
| WHERE p.price > 1000
| SELECT p.product_name, p.category, p.price
| ORDER p.price DESC, p.product_name ASC","repair_actions":["Added ORDER step to sort by p.price DESC and use p.product_name ASC as a deterministic tiebreaker."],"confidence":"medium"}

prediction:

| SELECT oi.item_id, oi.product_id, oi.quantity
| ORDER oi.item_id ASC
